hero.subheadline: ELPRESY leverages CART Decision Tree Regression to forecast your air conditioner's daily ampere consumption from just two inputs — enabling data-driven energy optimization for academic research and real-world application.

features.heading: Everything You Need to Analyze AC Energy Consumption
features.subheading: A comprehensive suite of tools built for rigorous academic analysis and practical energy monitoring.

predictionEngine.title:
CART Decision Tree
Regression Engine
predictionEngine.description: Powered by the ml-cart algorithm, our prediction engine delivers high-accuracy estimations using robust machine learning models optimized for continuous variables.

charts.title: Charts & Visualization
charts.description: Interactive charts that map out your predictions over time, making it easy to spot trends and anomalies.

history.title: History & Log
history.description: A detailed repository of all past predictions. Filter, search, and review historical data with ease.

export.title: Export Data
export.description: Export your findings instantly to CSV and PDF formats for academic reporting and further analysis.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-language
multiLanguage.description: Fully localized interface supporting both Indonesian and English to suit your audience.

howItWorks.heading: From Input to Insight in Three Steps
howItWorks.subheading: Our streamlined process makes complex machine learning predictions accessible and actionable.

step1.title: Input Variables
step1.description: Enter your AC's ampere per cycle and the total daily usage hours into the system.

step2.title: Run Prediction
step2.description: The CART Decision Tree Regression model processes your inputs to calculate the expected usage.

step3.title: Analyze Results
step3.description: View detailed charts, track historical performance, and export your data for further analysis.

howItWorks.poweredBy: Powered by ml-cart — CART Decision Tree Regression algorithm

preview.heading: A Research Tool Built for Precision
preview.subheading: Experience an interface designed for academic rigor without compromising on modern usability.

students.cardHeading: A research-grade prediction tool built for your thesis.
students.cardBody: From data entry to final export — ELPRESY gives you a structured, ML-powered workflow that transforms raw AC readings into thesis-grade analysis using CART Decision Tree Regression.
students.accessHeading: Ready to power your undergraduate thesis?
students.accessBody: Get full access to ELPRESY's prediction engine, visualization tools, and CSV/PDF export — built for academic research.

administrators.cardHeading: Centralized oversight for your research platform.
administrators.cardBody: Manage user access, configure system parameters, and monitor platform-wide activity with tools designed for administrative precision and research governance.
administrators.accessHeading: Take full control of your platform environment.
administrators.accessBody: Administrative tools to configure, monitor, and govern the ELPRESY research platform across all user roles.

operators.cardHeading: Daily monitoring and precision prediction management.
operators.cardBody: Execute prediction sessions, track real-time ampere readings, and manage the daily operational workflow of ELPRESY with streamlined operator-focused controls.
operators.accessBody: Operational tools for executing predictions, reviewing logs, and maintaining the accuracy of ELPRESY's CART model outputs.

engineers.cardHeading: Deep technical access to the prediction engine.
engineers.cardBody: Inspect model internals, review training data pipelines, and validate CART regression outputs with engineering-level tooling designed for performance analysis.
engineers.accessHeading: Build on top of ELPRESY's ML infrastructure.
engineers.accessBody: Technical documentation, model diagnostics, and integration details for engineers extending the ELPRESY prediction system.

research.exploreHeading: Explore everything ELPRESY has to offer

engine.label: Prediction Engine
engine.body: Built on CART Decision Tree Regression via the ml-cart library, the prediction engine processes two inputs — ampere per cycle and daily usage hours — to deliver high-accuracy daily ampere forecasts optimized for tropical AC usage patterns.

dataManagement.label: Data Management
dataManagement.body: Log, review, and manage all prediction inputs and outputs in a structured history view. Filter by date, export full datasets to CSV, and maintain a clean audit trail for academic reporting.

analytics.label: Analytics & Reports
analytics.body: Transform raw prediction data into meaningful insights with interactive charts and auto-generated PDF reports. Visualize consumption trends, track historical accuracy, and present findings with thesis-grade formatting.

config.label: System Configuration
config.body: Customize ELPRESY to your research environment — configure model parameters, set language preferences, manage user roles, and control data export settings from a unified configuration panel.

author.heading: The Mind Behind ELPRESY
author.name: [Your Name]
author.bio: This application serves as the practical implementation of my undergraduate thesis. It aims to demonstrate the viability of CART Decision Tree Regression in forecasting electrical consumption, providing an intuitive interface for a complex machine learning model.
